strengths: High GTM alignment (enterprise signal platform + Salesforce embed path)
Modern stack (Next.js 16, TypeScript, AI SDK multi-provider support)
Security primitives already present (JWT middleware + CSRF pattern)
bugs: Auth/token propagation edge cases on embed/easy-button routes
UI reliability gaps on demo-visible routes (loading/error/fallback paths)
Insufficient E2E coverage for critical flows
risks: Demo reliability risk before client-facing sessions
Limited CI depth (no E2E gating/preview env), increases regression risk
Complex Oracle/vector integrations with sparse failure-mode testing
recommendations: Prioritize demo hardening + route-level error boundaries this sprint
Enable Playwright smoke flows in CI and block merges on failures
Add embed contract tests (token passthrough + postMessage handshake)

strengths: Deep domain/IP coverage across portfolios, recommendations, compliance
Feature-complete legacy behavior with broad route/model surface
Recent critical hardening landed (Node 20 move + Dockerfile secret-exfil fix)
bugs: Legacy dependency CVE exposure remains (Sequelize 3.x and related packages)
Deprecated SDK/library usage (`request`, legacy Watson stack, older validators)
Test depth low relative to codebase age and complexity
risks: Modernization blast radius is high; incremental upgrades likely brittle
Residual security debt in old transitive dependency graph
Architecture drag: route-heavy legacy patterns impede velocity
recommendations: Treat as extraction + strangler migration, not full in-place modernization
Execute Sequelize v6+ migration plan behind adapter boundaries
Stand up baseline CI security gates (audit/SCA + smoke tests)

strengths: Strong feature ambition and broad AI workflow coverage
Good foundation choices (TypeScript, partial SQLite migration, Genkit flows)
Meaningful monetization upside with scheduling + multi-tenant path
bugs: Wildcard CORS still represented as a critical security gap
Remaining in-memory/JSON persistence patterns risk state loss and race conditions
Missing scheduling execution engine leaves promised automation incomplete
risks: Security posture (auth/CORS/token handling) can block external launch
Operational observability gaps increase MTTR for AI pipeline failures
recommendations: P0: lock CORS + token storage/refresh + endpoint validation
Migrate all critical state to SQLite (transactional repos)
Ship async scheduler/job status loop before growth-facing features

strengths: Modern FE baseline (Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + RTK + React Query)
Clear modular architecture conventions in source layout
Lint/typecheck/test scripts and Storybook scaffolding already present
bugs: Type safety debt (multiple TODOs around API-layer `any` elimination)
Coverage depth appears thin (few repo-owned tests)
Dependency/upgrade lag (React Query v4, TypeScript 4.x, ReactFlow 11)
risks: Regression risk due to weak CI enforcement and sparse integration tests
Performance risk from pending route code-splitting/bundle optimization work
Security risk from unresolved dependency audit and env handling tasks
recommendations: Add CI gates: typecheck + unit + MSW integration tests on PR
Prioritize API contract typing (zod schemas + generated client types)
Execute dependency modernization wave (React Query v5, TS5, ReactFlow v12)

strengths: Compelling product thesis (AI call screening + social engineering defense)
Core telephony/LLM/STT/TTS pipeline integrated across providers
Clear path to consumer monetization with subscription model
bugs: No comprehensive test harness for production call-path reliability
Known secrets-management incidents require continued remediation verification
Mobile app experience remains largely scaffold-level
risks: Production launch risk without full e2e telephony validation
Security/compliance risk from telephony + PII handling if controls lag
Operational risk from provider-latency and failover behavior under load
recommendations: Run structured red-team call dataset + confidence tuning for scam detection
Enforce CI security baseline (secret scanning, SAST, dependency audit)
Ship MVP iOS workflows (auth, call log, notification loop) before scale push
